title: How the big oil and gas CEOs think the Iran war supply disruption will play out
summary_full: The oil industry's grim outlook for global oil and gas supplies stands in contrast to the Trump administration's promise that the disruption is short term.
summary_public: The oil industry's grim outlook for global oil and gas supplies stands in contrast to the Trump administration's promise that the disruption is short term.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran war supply disruption will play out
